title: Academic Coach (English)
description:
Join Aspire Hub - Where Great Teachers Become Exceptional Coaches

At Aspire Hub, we're redefining education by recognising that every student learns differently. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all teaching - instead, our educators serve as coaches who tailor lessons to each student's unique needs, pace, and learning style. By combining academic excellence with life skills development, we create genuinely holistic learning experiences that prepare students for success beyond the classroom.

We're looking for inspired teachers (Primary/Secondary/JC levels, all subjects) who excel at creating tailored learning experiences that make a lasting difference.

What Makes You a Great Fit:

  • A recognized degree in a related discipline; teaching qualifications are an added advantage.

  • 2+ years of teaching or tutoring experience (MOE/Singapore curriculum knowledge preferred)

  • A natural ability to connect with students and build trust-based mentoring relationships

  • Exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal – confident engaging with students and professional when liaising with parents

  • Strong in classroom management and student motivation, especially in small group settings

  • Skilled in monitoring student progress, maintaining lesson records, and adapting strategies based on individual needs

  • Willingness to collaborate with fellow educators and contribute to a positive, professional teaching environment

  • Available to teach on Weekends and Public Holiday

  • This position only open to Singaporeans and Permanent residents only.

Why You'll Grow With Us:
✓ Teach small classes (6-8 students) with the freedom to customise your approach
✓ Design creative, engaging lessons that make learning come alive
✓ Build meaningful mentoring relationships with your students
✓ Track and celebrate each student's progress through detailed portfolios
✓ Collaborate with parents as partners in their child's education journey

We Offer:
★ Above-market compensation with performance bonuses
★ Small class sizes = Bigger impact + less stress
★ Professional development opportunities to grow your career
★ Work-life balance with flexible scheduling options
★ Comprehensive medical benefits and generous leave policy

Why exceptional educators choose us:

• Proven legacy: 20 years of excellence in personalized education

• Dedicated support: Ongoing training, resources, and mentorship

• Impactful teaching environment: Small classes that allow for meaningful connections

• Professional growth: Opportunities to develop your skills and leadership

For two decades, Aspire Hub has been committed to holistic education through passionate mentoring. We seek educators who:

✓ Connect authentically with students, fostering both academic success and personal growth

✓ Teach with contagious enthusiasm, creating engaging, student-centered learning experiences

✓ Believe in continuous improvement, supported by our professional development programs

postedCompany.name: ASPIRE HUB EDUCATION CENTRE @ BEDOK MALL PTE. LTD.
